channel.title: Set Featherpad to Not Remember History
channel.description:
Featherpad the notepad in LXQt remembers recently opened/modified.
To change this set to **0** “Recently Modified” to not remember history.

item.title: Set Featherpad to Not Remember History
item.dc:creator: desi_fubu
item.description:
Featherpad the notepad in LXQt remembers recently opened/modified.

To change this set to 0 “Recently Modified” to not remember history.

Read full topic
item.source: Set Featherpad to Not Remember History
